title: Comedycha Mamla
subTitle: Nandan, a modest thief, targets politician Amrajit Patil's farmhouse but luck fails when Amrajit, dancer Shraddha, and police complicate plans; Anjali uncovers all three.

title: Lockdown Lagna
subTitle: With the announcement of lockdown, an arranged marriage faces uncertainty. However, the couple tries to connect with each other through calls.

title: Halal
subTitle: Kaddus wishes to remarry his ex-wife, Halim. However, things get complicated when Halim's father objects to the reunion owing to their religious beliefs.

title: Patanjali Yog by Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Renowned Indian spiritual leader Swami Ramdev delivers demonstrations of various yoga poses and exercises for a healthy life.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Shikari
subTitle: Savita, an aspiring actress from a village, marries Bharat, a local director, but soon her ambitions overshadow her marriage. Later, she follows an admirer, Raghu, to Mumbai as he promises her fame.

title: Sher Shivraj
subTitle: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj uses his wits, vigour and courage to face one of his biggest rivals, Afzal Khan, and emerge victorious in the Battle of Pratapgad.

title: Swarajya Rakshak Sambhaji
subTitle: Sambhaji Maharaj confronts numerous obstacles as heir to the Maratha throne. Soon, he fights valiantly against Mughal invasions while managing internal conflicts and resource constraints.

subTitle: The host invites various celebrities and ordinary people into his kitchen to prepare delectable recipes and provide tips and tricks on kitchen chores and cooking.

title: Khulta Kali Khulena
